# Ignitus Knowledge Base -- llms.txt (repo-only)
#
# Machine-readable index of knowledge for AI assistants and developer tools.
# Convention: https://llmstxt.org/
#
# NOTE: This index is repo-only (not published to the website yet).

## Ignitus core (authoritative)

- AI Assistant Guide (Ignitus-specific): ./ignitus-core/ai-assistant-guide.md
- Developer Reference (Ignitus-specific): ./ignitus-core/developer-reference.md
- Security assurance (generated upstream): ./ignitus-core/security.md
- Whitepaper (markdown mirror): ./ignitus-core/whitepaper.md
- Changelog: ./ignitus-core/CHANGELOG-docs.md

## Solidity source mirrors (verbatim; for AI verification)

Fetch as plain text. Mirrors are maintained under `ignitus-core/contracts/`.

- ProtocolRouter.sol: ./ignitus-core/contracts/ProtocolRouter.sol
- EcosystemFactory.sol: ./ignitus-core/contracts/EcosystemFactory.sol
- USDCReserveToken.sol: ./ignitus-core/contracts/USDCReserveToken.sol
- BackingToken.sol: ./ignitus-core/contracts/BackingToken.sol
- FeeParticipationAccumulator.sol: ./ignitus-core/contracts/FeeParticipationAccumulator.sol
- MembershipNFT.sol: ./ignitus-core/contracts/MembershipNFT.sol
- IEcosystemFactorySponsor.sol: ./ignitus-core/contracts/IEcosystemFactorySponsor.sol
- IFeeParticipationAccumulator.sol: ./ignitus-core/contracts/IFeeParticipationAccumulator.sol
- IMembershipBackingToken.sol: ./ignitus-core/contracts/IMembershipBackingToken.sol

## Encyclopedia (generic; no protocol/service names)

High-level topic map:

- Banking (traditional, user POV): ./encyclopedia/banking-traditional/
- Lending & borrowing mechanics: ./encyclopedia/lending-borrowing/
- Debt sector (bonds/credit/leverage): ./encyclopedia/debt-sector/
- Hedge-fund-like structures (generic): ./encyclopedia/hedge-fund-structures/
- Fee & profit destruction layers: ./encyclopedia/fee-and-profit-layers/
- Risk & safety: ./encyclopedia/risk-and-safety/
- On-chain transparency (generic): ./encyclopedia/on-chain-transparency/
- Glossary: ./encyclopedia/glossary/

Key starter pages:

- Layer 1: Trading fees: ./encyclopedia/fee-and-profit-layers/layer-1-trading-fees.md
- Layer 2: Slippage & spreads: ./encyclopedia/fee-and-profit-layers/layer-2-slippage-and-spreads.md
- Layer 3: Liquidation cascades: ./encyclopedia/fee-and-profit-layers/layer-3-liquidation-cascades.md
- Layer 4: Management & performance fees: ./encyclopedia/fee-and-profit-layers/layer-4-management-and-performance-fees.md
- Layer 5: Impermanent loss & opportunity cost: ./encyclopedia/fee-and-profit-layers/layer-5-impermanent-loss-and-opportunity-cost.md
- Layer 6: Hidden costs in yield & rewards: ./encyclopedia/fee-and-profit-layers/layer-6-hidden-costs-in-yield-and-rewards.md
- Red flags checklist: ./encyclopedia/risk-and-safety/red-flags-checklist.md
- Verify a contract address: ./encyclopedia/on-chain-transparency/how_to_verify_a_contract_address.md
- Glossary (core terms): ./encyclopedia/glossary/core_terms.md

## Education (practical user POV guides; beginner-to-advanced)

High-level topic map:

- Getting started safely: ./education/getting-started-safely.md
- Understanding your risk tolerance: ./education/understanding-your-risk-tolerance.md
- Self-assessment series (multiple risk types): ./education/self-assess-*.md
- Step-by-step due diligence: ./education/step-by-step-due-diligence.md
- Reading financial documents: ./education/reading-financial-documents.md
- Avoiding common mistakes: ./education/avoiding-common-mistakes.md
- How to calculate real returns: ./education/how-to-calculate-real-returns.md
- Building a simple portfolio: ./education/building-a-simple-portfolio.md
- Long-term thinking: ./education/long-term-thinking.md

Key starter pages:

- Getting started safely: ./education/getting-started-safely.md
- Step-by-step due diligence: ./education/step-by-step-due-diligence.md
- Understanding your risk tolerance: ./education/understanding-your-risk-tolerance.md
- Self-assess your risk profile (full set): ./education/self-assess-*.md

## Safety note

This is not financial advice. Smart-contract risk, asset-issuer risk, custody risk,
and market volatility apply. Do your own research.
